methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.convertStringToStream
documentation:
Convert a string and write the output to an output stream.

text - The string content to convert. The string must not be empty.
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.convertStringToFile
documentation:
Convert a string and write the output to a file.

text - The string content to convert. The string must not be empty.
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.convertStream
documentation:
Convert the contents of an input stream.

in_stream - The input stream with source data. The stream can contain either HTML code or an archive (.zip, .tar.gz, .tar.bz2).The archive can contain HTML code and its external assets (images, style sheets, javascript).
return - Byte array containing the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.convertStreamToStream
documentation:
Convert the contents of an input stream and write the result to an output stream.

in_stream - The input stream with source data. The stream can contain either HTML code or an archive (.zip, .tar.gz, .tar.bz2).The archive can contain HTML code and its external assets (images, style sheets, javascript).
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.convertStreamToFile
documentation:
Convert the contents of an input stream and write the result to a local file.

in_stream - The input stream with source data. The stream can contain either HTML code or an archive (.zip, .tar.gz, .tar.bz2).The archive can contain HTML code and its external assets (images, style sheets, javascript).
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setZipMainFilename
documentation:
Set the file name of the main HTML document stored in the input archive. If not specified, the first HTML file in the archive is used for conversion. Use this method if the input archive contains multiple HTML documents.

filename - The file name.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setScreenshotWidth
documentation:
Set the output image width in pixels.

width - The value must be in the range 96-65000.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setScreenshotHeight
documentation:
Set the output image height in pixels. If it is not specified, actual document height is used.

height - Must be a positive integer number.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setScaleFactor
documentation:
Set the scaling factor (zoom) for the output image.

factor - The percentage value. Must be a positive integer number.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setBackgroundColor
documentation:
The output image background color.

color - The value must be in RRGGBB or RRGGBBAA hexadecimal format.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setUsePrintMedia
documentation:
Use the print version of the page if available (@media print).

value - Set to True to use the print version of the page.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setNoBackground
documentation:
Do not print the background graphics.

value - Set to True to disable the background graphics.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDisableJavascript
documentation:
Do not execute JavaScript.

value - Set to True to disable JavaScript in web pages.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDisableImageLoading
documentation:
Do not load images.

value - Set to True to disable loading of images.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDisableRemoteFonts
documentation:
Disable loading fonts from remote sources.

value - Set to True disable loading remote fonts.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setUseMobileUserAgent
documentation:
Use a mobile user agent.

value - Set to True to use a mobile user agent.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setLoadIframes
documentation:
Specifies how iframes are handled.

iframes - Allowed values are all, same-origin, none.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setBlockAds
documentation:
Try to block ads. Enabling this option can produce smaller output and speed up the conversion.

value - Set to True to block ads in web pages.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDefaultEncoding
documentation:
Set the default HTML content text encoding.

encoding - The text encoding of the HTML content.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setLocale
documentation:
Set the locale for the conversion. This may affect the output format of dates, times and numbers.

locale - The locale code according to ISO 639.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setHttpAuth
documentation:
Set credentials to access HTTP base authentication protected websites.

user_name - Set the HTTP authentication user name.
password - Set the HTTP authentication password.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setCookies
documentation:
Set cookies that are sent in Pdfcrowd HTTP requests.

cookies - The cookie string.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setVerifySslCertificates
documentation:
Do not allow insecure HTTPS connections.

value - Set to True to enable SSL certificate verification.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setFailOnMainUrlError
documentation:
Abort the conversion if the main URL HTTP status code is greater than or equal to 400.

fail_on_error - Set to True to abort the conversion.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setFailOnAnyUrlError
documentation:
Abort the conversion if any of the sub-request HTTP status code is greater than or equal to 400 or if some sub-requests are still pending. See details in a debug log.

fail_on_error - Set to True to abort the conversion.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setNoXpdfcrowdHeader
documentation:
Do not send the X-Pdfcrowd HTTP header in Pdfcrowd HTTP requests.

value - Set to True to disable sending X-Pdfcrowd HTTP header.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setCustomCss
documentation:
Apply custom CSS to the input HTML document. It allows you to modify the visual appearance and layout of your HTML content dynamically. Tip: Using !important in custom CSS provides a way to prioritize and override conflicting styles.

css - A string containing valid CSS. The string must not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setCustomJavascript
documentation:
Run a custom JavaScript after the document is loaded and ready to print. The script is intended for post-load DOM manipulation (add/remove elements, update CSS, ...). In addition to the standard browser APIs, the custom JavaScript code can use helper functions from our JavaScript library.

javascript - A string containing a JavaScript code. The string must not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setOnLoadJavascript
documentation:
Run a custom JavaScript right after the document is loaded. The script is intended for early DOM manipulation (add/remove elements, update CSS, ...). In addition to the standard browser APIs, the custom JavaScript code can use helper functions from our JavaScript library.

javascript - A string containing a JavaScript code. The string must not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setCustomHttpHeader
documentation:
Set a custom HTTP header that is sent in Pdfcrowd HTTP requests.

header - A string containing the header name and value separated by a colon.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setJavascriptDelay
documentation:
Wait the specified number of milliseconds to finish all JavaScript after the document is loaded. Your API license defines the maximum wait time by "Max Delay" parameter.

delay - The number of milliseconds to wait. Must be a positive integer number or 0.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setElementToConvert
documentation:
Convert only the specified element from the main document and its children. The element is specified by one or more CSS selectors. If the element is not found, the conversion fails. If multiple elements are found, the first one is used.

selectors - One or more CSS selectors separated by commas. The string must not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setElementToConvertMode
documentation:
Specify the DOM handling when only a part of the document is converted. This can affect the CSS rules used.

mode - Allowed values are cut-out, remove-siblings, hide-siblings.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setWaitForElement
documentation:
Wait for the specified element in a source document. The element is specified by one or more CSS selectors. The element is searched for in the main document and all iframes. If the element is not found, the conversion fails. Your API license defines the maximum wait time by "Max Delay" parameter.

selectors - One or more CSS selectors separated by commas. The string must not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setAutoDetectElementToConvert
documentation:
The main HTML element for conversion is detected automatically.

value - Set to True to detect the main element.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setReadabilityEnhancements
documentation:
The input HTML is automatically enhanced to improve the readability.

enhancements - Allowed values are none, readability-v1, readability-v2, readability-v3, readability-v4.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDataString
documentation:
Set the input data for template rendering. The data format can be JSON, XML, YAML or CSV.

data_string - The input data string.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDataFile
documentation:
Load the input data for template rendering from the specified file. The data format can be JSON, XML, YAML or CSV.

data_file - The file path to a local file containing the input data.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDataFormat
documentation:
Specify the input data format.

data_format - The data format. Allowed values are auto, json, xml, yaml, csv.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDataEncoding
documentation:
Set the encoding of the data file set by setDataFile.

encoding - The data file encoding.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDataIgnoreUndefined
documentation:
Ignore undefined variables in the HTML template. The default mode is strict so any undefined variable causes the conversion to fail. You can use {% if variable is defined %} to check if the variable is defined.

value - Set to True to ignore undefined variables.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDataAutoEscape
documentation:
Auto escape HTML symbols in the input data before placing them into the output.

value - Set to True to turn auto escaping on.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDataTrimBlocks
documentation:
Auto trim whitespace around each template command block.

value - Set to True to turn auto trimming on.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDataOptions
documentation:
Set the advanced data options:csv_delimiter - The CSV data delimiter, the default is ,.xml_remove_root - Remove the root XML element from the input data.data_root - The name of the root element inserted into the input data without a root node (e.g. CSV), the default is data.

options - Comma separated list of options.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setDebugLog
documentation:
Turn on the debug logging. Details about the conversion are stored in the debug log. The URL of the log can be obtained from the getDebugLogUrl method or available in conversion statistics.

value - Set to True to enable the debug logging.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.getDebugLogUrl
documentation:
Get the URL of the debug log for the last conversion.
return - The link to the debug log.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.getRemainingCreditCount
documentation:
Get the number of conversion credits available in your account.
This method can only be called after a call to one of the convertXtoY methods.
The returned value can differ from the actual count if you run parallel conversions.
The special value 999999 is returned if the information is not available.
return - The number of credits.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.getConsumedCreditCount
documentation:
Get the number of credits consumed by the last conversion.
return - The number of credits.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.getJobId
documentation:
Get the job id.
return - The unique job identifier.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.getOutputSize
documentation:
Get the size of the output in bytes.
return - The count of bytes.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.getVersion
documentation:
Get the version details.
return - API version, converter version, and client version.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setTag
documentation:
Tag the conversion with a custom value. The tag is used in conversion statistics. A value longer than 32 characters is cut off.

tag - A string with the custom tag.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setHttpProxy
documentation:
A proxy server used by Pdfcrowd conversion process for accessing the source URLs with HTTP scheme. It can help to circumvent regional restrictions or provide limited access to your intranet.

proxy - The value must have format DOMAIN_OR_IP_ADDRESS:PORT.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setHttpsProxy
documentation:
A proxy server used by Pdfcrowd conversion process for accessing the source URLs with HTTPS scheme. It can help to circumvent regional restrictions or provide limited access to your intranet.

proxy - The value must have format DOMAIN_OR_IP_ADDRESS:PORT.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setClientCertificate
documentation:
A client certificate to authenticate Pdfcrowd converter on your web server. The certificate is used for two-way SSL/TLS authentication and adds extra security.

certificate - The file must be in PKCS12 format. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setClientCertificatePassword
documentation:
A password for PKCS12 file with a client certificate if it is needed.

password -
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setMaxLoadingTime
documentation:
Set the maximum time to load the page and its resources. After this time, all requests will be considered successful. This can be useful to ensure that the conversion does not timeout. Use this method if there is no other way to fix page loading.

max_time - The number of seconds to wait. The value must be in the range 10-30.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setConverterUserAgent
documentation:
Specifies the User-Agent HTTP header that will be used by the converter when a request is made to the converted web page.

agent - The user agent.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setConverterVersion
documentation:
Set the converter version. Different versions may produce different output. Choose which one provides the best output for your case.

version - The version identifier. Allowed values are 24.04, 20.10, 18.10, latest.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setUseHttp
documentation:
Specifies if the client communicates over HTTP or HTTPS with Pdfcrowd API.
Warning: Using HTTP is insecure as data sent over HTTP is not encrypted. Enable this option only if you know what you are doing.

value - Set to True to use HTTP.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setClientUserAgent
documentation:
Specifies the User-Agent HTTP header that the client library will use when interacting with the API.

agent - The user agent string.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setUserAgent
documentation:
Set a custom user agent HTTP header. It can be useful if you are behind a proxy or a firewall.

agent - The user agent string.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setProxy
documentation:
Specifies an HTTP proxy that the API client library will use to connect to the internet.

host - The proxy hostname.
port - The proxy port.
user_name - The username.
password - The password.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.HtmlToImageClient.setRetryCount
documentation:
Specifies the number of automatic retries when the 502 or 503 HTTP status code is received. The status code indicates a temporary network issue. This feature can be disabled by setting to 0.

count - Number of retries.
return - The converter object.
Conversion from HTML to image.

classes.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.__init__
documentation:
Constructor for the Pdfcrowd API client.

user_name - Your username at Pdfcrowd.
api_key - Your API key.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertUrl
documentation:
Convert an image.

url - The address of the image to convert. The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - Byte array containing the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertUrlToStream
documentation:
Convert an image and write the result to an output stream.

url - The address of the image to convert. The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertUrlToFile
documentation:
Convert an image and write the result to a local file.

url - The address of the image to convert. The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertFile
documentation:
Convert a local file.

file - The path to a local file to convert. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - Byte array containing the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertFileToStream
documentation:
Convert a local file and write the result to an output stream.

file - The path to a local file to convert. The file must exist and not be empty.
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertFileToFile
documentation:
Convert a local file and write the result to a local file.

file - The path to a local file to convert. The file must exist and not be empty.
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertRawData
documentation:
Convert raw data.

data - The raw content to be converted.
return - Byte array with the output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertRawDataToStream
documentation:
Convert raw data and write the result to an output stream.

data - The raw content to be converted.
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertRawDataToFile
documentation:
Convert raw data to a file.

data - The raw content to be converted.
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertStream
documentation:
Convert the contents of an input stream.

in_stream - The input stream with source data.
return - Byte array containing the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertStreamToStream
documentation:
Convert the contents of an input stream and write the result to an output stream.

in_stream - The input stream with source data.
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.convertStreamToFile
documentation:
Convert the contents of an input stream and write the result to a local file.

in_stream - The input stream with source data.
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setOutputFormat
documentation:
The format of the output file.

output_format - Allowed values are png, jpg, gif, tiff, bmp, ico, ppm, pgm, pbm, pnm, psb, pct, ras, tga, sgi, sun, webp.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setResize
documentation:
Resize the image.

resize - The resize percentage or new image dimensions.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setRotate
documentation:
Rotate the image.

rotate - The rotation specified in degrees.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCropAreaX
documentation:
Set the top left X coordinate of the content area. It is relative to the top left X coordinate of the print area.

x - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCropAreaY
documentation:
Set the top left Y coordinate of the content area. It is relative to the top left Y coordinate of the print area.

y - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCropAreaWidth
documentation:
Set the width of the content area. It should be at least 1 inch.

width - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCropAreaHeight
documentation:
Set the height of the content area. It should be at least 1 inch.

height - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCropArea
documentation:
Set the content area position and size. The content area enables to specify the part to be converted.

x - Set the top left X coordinate of the content area. It is relative to the top left X coordinate of the print area. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
y - Set the top left Y coordinate of the content area. It is relative to the top left Y coordinate of the print area. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
width - Set the width of the content area. It should be at least 1 inch. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
height - Set the height of the content area. It should be at least 1 inch. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setRemoveBorders
documentation:
Remove borders of an image which does not change in color.

value - Set to True to remove borders.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCanvasSize
documentation:
Set the output canvas size.

size - Allowed values are A0, A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, A6, Letter.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCanvasWidth
documentation:
Set the output canvas width.

width - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCanvasHeight
documentation:
Set the output canvas height.

height - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCanvasDimensions
documentation:
Set the output canvas dimensions. If no canvas size is specified, margins are applied as a border around the image.

width - Set the output canvas width. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
height - Set the output canvas height. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setOrientation
documentation:
Set the output canvas orientation.

orientation - Allowed values are landscape, portrait.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setPosition
documentation:
Set the image position on the canvas.

position - Allowed values are center, top, bottom, left, right, top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setPrintCanvasMode
documentation:
Set the mode to print the image on the canvas.

mode - Allowed values are default, fit, stretch.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setMarginTop
documentation:
Set the output canvas top margin.

top - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setMarginRight
documentation:
Set the output canvas right margin.

right - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setMarginBottom
documentation:
Set the output canvas bottom margin.

bottom - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setMarginLeft
documentation:
Set the output canvas left margin.

left - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setMargins
documentation:
Set the output canvas margins.

top - Set the output canvas top margin. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
right - Set the output canvas right margin. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
bottom - Set the output canvas bottom margin. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
left - Set the output canvas left margin. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setCanvasBackgroundColor
documentation:
The canvas background color in RGB or RGBA hexadecimal format. The color fills the entire canvas regardless of margins. If no canvas size is specified and the image format supports background (e.g. PDF, PNG), the background color is applied too.

color - The value must be in RRGGBB or RRGGBBAA hexadecimal format.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setDpi
documentation:
Set the DPI resolution of the input image. The DPI affects margin options specified in points too (e.g. 1 point is equal to 1 pixel in 96 DPI).

dpi - The DPI value.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setDebugLog
documentation:
Turn on the debug logging. Details about the conversion are stored in the debug log. The URL of the log can be obtained from the getDebugLogUrl method or available in conversion statistics.

value - Set to True to enable the debug logging.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.getDebugLogUrl
documentation:
Get the URL of the debug log for the last conversion.
return - The link to the debug log.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.getRemainingCreditCount
documentation:
Get the number of conversion credits available in your account.
This method can only be called after a call to one of the convertXtoY methods.
The returned value can differ from the actual count if you run parallel conversions.
The special value 999999 is returned if the information is not available.
return - The number of credits.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.getConsumedCreditCount
documentation:
Get the number of credits consumed by the last conversion.
return - The number of credits.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.getJobId
documentation:
Get the job id.
return - The unique job identifier.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.getOutputSize
documentation:
Get the size of the output in bytes.
return - The count of bytes.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.getVersion
documentation:
Get the version details.
return - API version, converter version, and client version.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setTag
documentation:
Tag the conversion with a custom value. The tag is used in conversion statistics. A value longer than 32 characters is cut off.

tag - A string with the custom tag.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setHttpProxy
documentation:
A proxy server used by Pdfcrowd conversion process for accessing the source URLs with HTTP scheme. It can help to circumvent regional restrictions or provide limited access to your intranet.

proxy - The value must have format DOMAIN_OR_IP_ADDRESS:PORT.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setHttpsProxy
documentation:
A proxy server used by Pdfcrowd conversion process for accessing the source URLs with HTTPS scheme. It can help to circumvent regional restrictions or provide limited access to your intranet.

proxy - The value must have format DOMAIN_OR_IP_ADDRESS:PORT.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setConverterVersion
documentation:
Set the converter version. Different versions may produce different output. Choose which one provides the best output for your case.

version - The version identifier. Allowed values are 24.04, 20.10, 18.10, latest.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setUseHttp
documentation:
Specifies if the client communicates over HTTP or HTTPS with Pdfcrowd API.
Warning: Using HTTP is insecure as data sent over HTTP is not encrypted. Enable this option only if you know what you are doing.

value - Set to True to use HTTP.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setClientUserAgent
documentation:
Specifies the User-Agent HTTP header that the client library will use when interacting with the API.

agent - The user agent string.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setUserAgent
documentation:
Set a custom user agent HTTP header. It can be useful if you are behind a proxy or a firewall.

agent - The user agent string.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setProxy
documentation:
Specifies an HTTP proxy that the API client library will use to connect to the internet.

host - The proxy hostname.
port - The proxy port.
user_name - The username.
password - The password.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToImageClient.setRetryCount
documentation:
Specifies the number of automatic retries when the 502 or 503 HTTP status code is received. The status code indicates a temporary network issue. This feature can be disabled by setting to 0.

count - Number of retries.
return - The converter object.
Conversion from one image format to another image format.

classes.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.__init__
documentation:
Constructor for the Pdfcrowd API client.

user_name - Your username at Pdfcrowd.
api_key - Your API key.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setAction
documentation:
Specifies the action to be performed on the input PDFs.

action - Allowed values are join, shuffle, extract, delete.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.convert
documentation:
Perform an action on the input files.
return - Byte array containing the output PDF.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.convertToStream
documentation:
Perform an action on the input files and write the output PDF to an output stream.

out_stream - The output stream that will contain the output PDF.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.convertToFile
documentation:
Perform an action on the input files and write the output PDF to a file.

file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.addPdfFile
documentation:
Add a PDF file to the list of the input PDFs.

file_path - The file path to a local PDF file. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.addPdfRawData
pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setInputPdfPassword
documentation:
Password to open the encrypted PDF file.

password - The input PDF password.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setPageRange
documentation:
Set the page range for extract or delete action.

pages - A comma separated list of page numbers or ranges.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setPageWatermark
documentation:
Apply a watermark to each page of the output PDF file. A watermark can be either a PDF or an image. If a multi-page file (PDF or TIFF) is used, the first page is used as the watermark.

watermark - The file path to a local file. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setPageWatermarkUrl
documentation:
Load a file from the specified URL and apply the file as a watermark to each page of the output PDF. A watermark can be either a PDF or an image. If a multi-page file (PDF or TIFF) is used, the first page is used as the watermark.

url - The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setMultipageWatermark
documentation:
Apply each page of a watermark to the corresponding page of the output PDF. A watermark can be either a PDF or an image.

watermark - The file path to a local file. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setMultipageWatermarkUrl
documentation:
Load a file from the specified URL and apply each page of the file as a watermark to the corresponding page of the output PDF. A watermark can be either a PDF or an image.

url - The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setPageBackground
documentation:
Apply a background to each page of the output PDF file. A background can be either a PDF or an image. If a multi-page file (PDF or TIFF) is used, the first page is used as the background.

background - The file path to a local file. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setPageBackgroundUrl
documentation:
Load a file from the specified URL and apply the file as a background to each page of the output PDF. A background can be either a PDF or an image. If a multi-page file (PDF or TIFF) is used, the first page is used as the background.

url - The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setMultipageBackground
documentation:
Apply each page of a background to the corresponding page of the output PDF. A background can be either a PDF or an image.

background - The file path to a local file. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setMultipageBackgroundUrl
documentation:
Load a file from the specified URL and apply each page of the file as a background to the corresponding page of the output PDF. A background can be either a PDF or an image.

url - The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setLinearize
documentation:
Create linearized PDF. This is also known as Fast Web View.

value - Set to True to create linearized PDF.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setEncrypt
documentation:
Encrypt the PDF. This prevents search engines from indexing the contents.

value - Set to True to enable PDF encryption.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setUserPassword
documentation:
Protect the PDF with a user password. When a PDF has a user password, it must be supplied in order to view the document and to perform operations allowed by the access permissions.

password - The user password.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setOwnerPassword
documentation:
Protect the PDF with an owner password. Supplying an owner password grants unlimited access to the PDF including changing the passwords and access permissions.

password - The owner password.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setNoPrint
documentation:
Disallow printing of the output PDF.

value - Set to True to set the no-print flag in the output PDF.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setNoModify
documentation:
Disallow modification of the output PDF.

value - Set to True to set the read-only only flag in the output PDF.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setNoCopy
documentation:
Disallow text and graphics extraction from the output PDF.

value - Set to True to set the no-copy flag in the output PDF.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setTitle
documentation:
Set the title of the PDF.

title - The title.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setSubject
documentation:
Set the subject of the PDF.

subject - The subject.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setAuthor
documentation:
Set the author of the PDF.

author - The author.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setKeywords
documentation:
Associate keywords with the document.

keywords - The string with the keywords.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setUseMetadataFrom
documentation:
Use metadata (title, subject, author and keywords) from the n-th input PDF.

index - Set the index of the input PDF file from which to use the metadata. 0 means no metadata. Must be a positive integer number or 0.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setPageLayout
documentation:
Specify the page layout to be used when the document is opened.

layout - Allowed values are single-page, one-column, two-column-left, two-column-right.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setPageMode
documentation:
Specify how the document should be displayed when opened.

mode - Allowed values are full-screen, thumbnails, outlines.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setInitialZoomType
documentation:
Specify how the page should be displayed when opened.

zoom_type - Allowed values are fit-width, fit-height, fit-page.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setInitialPage
documentation:
Display the specified page when the document is opened.

page - Must be a positive integer number.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setInitialZoom
documentation:
Specify the initial page zoom in percents when the document is opened.

zoom - Must be a positive integer number.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setHideToolbar
documentation:
Specify whether to hide the viewer application's tool bars when the document is active.

value - Set to True to hide tool bars.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setHideMenubar
documentation:
Specify whether to hide the viewer application's menu bar when the document is active.

value - Set to True to hide the menu bar.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setHideWindowUi
documentation:
Specify whether to hide user interface elements in the document's window (such as scroll bars and navigation controls), leaving only the document's contents displayed.

value - Set to True to hide ui elements.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setFitWindow
documentation:
Specify whether to resize the document's window to fit the size of the first displayed page.

value - Set to True to resize the window.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setCenterWindow
documentation:
Specify whether to position the document's window in the center of the screen.

value - Set to True to center the window.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setDisplayTitle
documentation:
Specify whether the window's title bar should display the document title. If false , the title bar should instead display the name of the PDF file containing the document.

value - Set to True to display the title.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setRightToLeft
documentation:
Set the predominant reading order for text to right-to-left. This option has no direct effect on the document's contents or page numbering but can be used to determine the relative positioning of pages when displayed side by side or printed n-up

value - Set to True to set right-to-left reading order.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setDebugLog
documentation:
Turn on the debug logging. Details about the conversion are stored in the debug log. The URL of the log can be obtained from the getDebugLogUrl method or available in conversion statistics.

value - Set to True to enable the debug logging.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.getDebugLogUrl
documentation:
Get the URL of the debug log for the last conversion.
return - The link to the debug log.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.getRemainingCreditCount
documentation:
Get the number of conversion credits available in your account.
This method can only be called after a call to one of the convertXtoY methods.
The returned value can differ from the actual count if you run parallel conversions.
The special value 999999 is returned if the information is not available.
return - The number of credits.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.getConsumedCreditCount
documentation:
Get the number of credits consumed by the last conversion.
return - The number of credits.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.getJobId
documentation:
Get the job id.
return - The unique job identifier.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.getPageCount
documentation:
Get the number of pages in the output document.
return - The page count.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.getOutputSize
documentation:
Get the size of the output in bytes.
return - The count of bytes.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.getVersion
documentation:
Get the version details.
return - API version, converter version, and client version.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setTag
documentation:
Tag the conversion with a custom value. The tag is used in conversion statistics. A value longer than 32 characters is cut off.

tag - A string with the custom tag.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setConverterVersion
documentation:
Set the converter version. Different versions may produce different output. Choose which one provides the best output for your case.

version - The version identifier. Allowed values are 24.04, 20.10, 18.10, latest.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setUseHttp
documentation:
Specifies if the client communicates over HTTP or HTTPS with Pdfcrowd API.
Warning: Using HTTP is insecure as data sent over HTTP is not encrypted. Enable this option only if you know what you are doing.

value - Set to True to use HTTP.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setClientUserAgent
documentation:
Specifies the User-Agent HTTP header that the client library will use when interacting with the API.

agent - The user agent string.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setUserAgent
documentation:
Set a custom user agent HTTP header. It can be useful if you are behind a proxy or a firewall.

agent - The user agent string.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setProxy
documentation:
Specifies an HTTP proxy that the API client library will use to connect to the internet.

host - The proxy hostname.
port - The proxy port.
user_name - The username.
password - The password.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.PdfToPdfClient.setRetryCount
documentation:
Specifies the number of automatic retries when the 502 or 503 HTTP status code is received. The status code indicates a temporary network issue. This feature can be disabled by setting to 0.

count - Number of retries.
return - The converter object.
Conversion from PDF to PDF.

classes.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.__init__
documentation:
Constructor for the Pdfcrowd API client.

user_name - Your username at Pdfcrowd.
api_key - Your API key.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertUrl
documentation:
Convert an image.

url - The address of the image to convert. The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - Byte array containing the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertUrlToStream
documentation:
Convert an image and write the result to an output stream.

url - The address of the image to convert. The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertUrlToFile
documentation:
Convert an image and write the result to a local file.

url - The address of the image to convert. The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertFile
documentation:
Convert a local file.

file - The path to a local file to convert. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - Byte array containing the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertFileToStream
documentation:
Convert a local file and write the result to an output stream.

file - The path to a local file to convert. The file must exist and not be empty.
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertFileToFile
documentation:
Convert a local file and write the result to a local file.

file - The path to a local file to convert. The file must exist and not be empty.
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertRawData
documentation:
Convert raw data.

data - The raw content to be converted.
return - Byte array with the output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertRawDataToStream
documentation:
Convert raw data and write the result to an output stream.

data - The raw content to be converted.
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertRawDataToFile
documentation:
Convert raw data to a file.

data - The raw content to be converted.
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertStream
documentation:
Convert the contents of an input stream.

in_stream - The input stream with source data.
return - Byte array containing the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertStreamToStream
documentation:
Convert the contents of an input stream and write the result to an output stream.

in_stream - The input stream with source data.
out_stream - The output stream that will contain the conversion output.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.convertStreamToFile
documentation:
Convert the contents of an input stream and write the result to a local file.

in_stream - The input stream with source data.
file_path - The output file path. The string must not be empty.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setResize
documentation:
Resize the image.

resize - The resize percentage or new image dimensions.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setRotate
documentation:
Rotate the image.

rotate - The rotation specified in degrees.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setCropAreaX
documentation:
Set the top left X coordinate of the content area. It is relative to the top left X coordinate of the print area.

x - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setCropAreaY
documentation:
Set the top left Y coordinate of the content area. It is relative to the top left Y coordinate of the print area.

y - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setCropAreaWidth
documentation:
Set the width of the content area. It should be at least 1 inch.

width - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setCropAreaHeight
documentation:
Set the height of the content area. It should be at least 1 inch.

height - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setCropArea
documentation:
Set the content area position and size. The content area enables to specify the part to be converted.

x - Set the top left X coordinate of the content area. It is relative to the top left X coordinate of the print area. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
y - Set the top left Y coordinate of the content area. It is relative to the top left Y coordinate of the print area. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
width - Set the width of the content area. It should be at least 1 inch. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
height - Set the height of the content area. It should be at least 1 inch. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setRemoveBorders
documentation:
Remove borders of an image which does not change in color.

value - Set to True to remove borders.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setPageSize
documentation:
Set the output page size.

size - Allowed values are A0, A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, A6, Letter.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setPageWidth
documentation:
Set the output page width.

width - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setPageHeight
documentation:
Set the output page height.

height - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setPageDimensions
documentation:
Set the output page dimensions. If no page size is specified, margins are applied as a border around the image.

width - Set the output page width. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
height - Set the output page height. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setOrientation
documentation:
Set the output page orientation.

orientation - Allowed values are landscape, portrait.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setPosition
documentation:
Set the image position on the page.

position - Allowed values are center, top, bottom, left, right, top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setPrintPageMode
documentation:
Set the mode to print the image on the content area of the page.

mode - Allowed values are default, fit, stretch.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setMarginTop
documentation:
Set the output page top margin.

top - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setMarginRight
documentation:
Set the output page right margin.

right - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setMarginBottom
documentation:
Set the output page bottom margin.

bottom - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setMarginLeft
documentation:
Set the output page left margin.

left - The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setPageMargins
documentation:
Set the output page margins.

top - Set the output page top margin. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
right - Set the output page right margin. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
bottom - Set the output page bottom margin. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
left - Set the output page left margin. The value must be specified in inches "in", millimeters "mm", centimeters "cm", pixels "px", or points "pt".
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setPageBackgroundColor
documentation:
The page background color in RGB or RGBA hexadecimal format. The color fills the entire page regardless of the margins. If not page size is specified and the image format supports background (e.g. PDF, PNG), the background color is applied too.

color - The value must be in RRGGBB or RRGGBBAA hexadecimal format.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setDpi
documentation:
Set the DPI resolution of the input image. The DPI affects margin options specified in points too (e.g. 1 point is equal to 1 pixel in 96 DPI).

dpi - The DPI value.
return - The converter object.

documentation:
Apply a watermark to each page of the output PDF file. A watermark can be either a PDF or an image. If a multi-page file (PDF or TIFF) is used, the first page is used as the watermark.

return - The converter object.

Load a file from the specified URL and apply the file as a watermark to each page of the output PDF. A watermark can be either a PDF or an image. If a multi-page file (PDF or TIFF) is used, the first page is used as the watermark.

url - The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - The converter object.

documentation:
Apply each page of a watermark to the corresponding page of the output PDF. A watermark can be either a PDF or an image.

watermark - The file path to a local file. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setMultipageWatermarkUrl
documentation:
Load a file from the specified URL and apply each page of the file as a watermark to the corresponding page of the output PDF. A watermark can be either a PDF or an image.

url - The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - The converter object.

documentation:
Apply a background to each page of the output PDF file. A background can be either a PDF or an image. If a multi-page file (PDF or TIFF) is used, the first page is used as the background.

background - The file path to a local file. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setPageBackgroundUrl
documentation:
Load a file from the specified URL and apply the file as a background to each page of the output PDF. A background can be either a PDF or an image. If a multi-page file (PDF or TIFF) is used, the first page is used as the background.

url - The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setMultipageBackground
documentation:
Apply each page of a background to the corresponding page of the output PDF. A background can be either a PDF or an image.

background - The file path to a local file. The file must exist and not be empty.
return - The converter object.

methods.name: pdfcrowd.ImageToPdfClient.setMultipageBackgroundUrl
documentation:
Load a file from the specified URL and apply each page of the file as a background to the corresponding page of the output PDF. A background can be either a PDF or an image.

url - The supported protocols are http:// and https://.
return - The converter object.

Create linearized PDF. This is also known as Fast Web View.
